headline: Allstate (ALL) Valuation Check After Strong Q1 Beat And US$4b Share Buyback Announcement
summary: Allstate (ALL) is back in the spotlight after first quarter 2026 earnings significantly outpaced analyst expectations, with stronger underwriting profitability, lower catastrophe related losses, higher policies in force, and a new US$4b share repurchase authorization. See our latest analysis for Allstate. Allstate’s recent results have been reflected in the share price, with a 4.6% 1 month share price return and a 7.9% 3 month share price return.
